hero.title: Miguel Dacal
hero.tagline: Win qualified clients, get your hours back, sell without leaving it to luck.
hero.bio: AI, automation and paid growth systems for SMBs and professionals who want to turn their marketing into predictable revenue.

solutions.title: What I solve
solutions.sub: The pains that lead business owners and professionals to look for someone like me — and how I solve them in production, not in slides.

s1.pain: I'm losing leads because I don't reply fast enough.
s1.fix: WhatsApp bots and AI voice agents that answer, qualify and book on Cal.com 24/7. Zero cold leads sitting in a queue waiting for someone to reply tomorrow.

s2.pain: My team is burning out on repetitive tasks.
s2.fix: n8n automations that connect your tools (forms, CRM, Sheets, calendar, email) and remove the manual work that doesn't scale. Your team stops copy-pasting and gets back to selling.

s3.pain: I get traffic but I'm not converting.
s3.fix: End-to-end paid funnels: landing page, Google and Meta Ads campaigns, real tracking with GTM and GA4, audience segmentation and creative iteration until CPA makes sense. Stop burning budget on clicks that don't buy.

s4.pain: I have data but not decisions.
s4.fix: AI agents and pipelines (RAG, MCP) that read, summarize and act on your information — from competitor analysis to content generation and reporting. Decisions on data, not intuition.

s5.pain: I want to use AI but I don't know where to start.
s5.fix: Honest diagnosis + a tailored system with LLMs (Claude, GPT, Gemini): we start where you save or sell the most, not where the hype is. No endless projects, no agency lock-in.

about.title: Why work with me
about.p1: I come from two worlds that rarely cross: 16 years as a civil servant in the Spanish Government taught me to document processes, hit deadlines and work with rigor; 20+ years between technology and business taught me to build and to sell. For you, this means I won't just "install AI" — I understand how your business runs and where automation actually moves the needle.
about.p2: Today I build end-to-end solutions for SMBs, professionals and indie products — WhatsApp bots, voice AI agents, AI pipelines and paid acquisition funnels — while building a viral content research SaaS solo on the side. Certified Implementer for AI Automation by Dania.ai. I learn any new technology fast and I apply the latest to real problems, not to demos.
about.focusValue: Customer acquisition, AI automation and predictable sales
about.statusValue: Open to work · Freelance and full-time

projects.title: Selected projects
projects.sub: What's already running in production and what I'm shipping now — told by the client outcome, not by the stack.

p1.title: Viral Content Research SaaS
p1.desc: Helps YouTube creators publish content with a much higher chance of going viral by starting from patterns already validated by the market. Detects the real viral videos in a niche, extracts what made them work and generates ideas, scripts, hooks and copies ready to film. Built solo, end-to-end.
p1.tags: FastAPI · Supabase + pgvector · Celery · Redis · Next.js · Multi-agent · Claude Code

p2.title: WhatsApp Lead Qualification Bot
p2.desc: Turns WhatsApp conversations into booked appointments, 24/7 and hands-off. The bot greets, qualifies the lead, books on Cal.com and only escalates to a human when needed — the team stops chasing messages and spends time closing.
p2.tags: n8n · WhatsApp Business API · RAG · Cal.com

p3.title: Voice AI Booking Agent
p3.desc: Picks up every inbound call, qualifies and books — even after hours. No voicemail, no queues, no missed opportunities because nobody answered. Callers hang up with a confirmed appointment, you hang up with a full calendar.

p4.title: Multi-phase Ad Generation Pipeline
p4.desc: Turns ad creative into a production line: studies your competitors' ads, extracts the patterns that already work, generates scripts and produces the final video. More creatives shipped per week, less dependence on freelancers and on inspiration.
p4.tags: Apify · Gemini Vision · Claude · Veo 3 · n8n

p5.title: End-to-end Paid Acquisition Funnels
p5.desc: Two full funnels delivered for clients: landing page, Google Ads campaigns, real tracking with GTM, GA4 dashboards, audience segmentation, keyword research and creative iteration. Traffic that no longer goes to waste and a measurable CPA you can optimize.
p5.tags: Google Ads · GTM · GA4 · WordPress · Paid Media

p6.title: Lead Scraper — Google Maps
p6.desc: Fills your B2B pipeline with zero manual work: scrapes businesses from Google Maps by sector and area, extracts and dedupes emails, and pushes them to Sheets, ready for cold outreach. Reusable from any other automation.
p6.tags: n8n · Google Maps · Email extraction · Sheets

process.title: How I work
process.sub: Four steps designed so you see value early and always know where we stand.
process.step1Body: A 30-min call to understand the real bottleneck, not the symptom. You leave with a clear map of the current process and what to automate first.
process.step2Body: A concrete proposal: what gets automated, with which tools, what it costs and which metric you'll move. No fluff, no endless dependencies.
process.step3Body: I build the system end-to-end, wired to your real tools and tested in production. You see progress along the way — no waiting for a "big reveal".
process.step4Body: I leave the tracking set up (GA4, dashboards, logs) so you know what's working. We iterate on data, not on opinions.

skills.title: Stack
skills.sub: The pieces I use to build the systems that capture, sell and work for you.

contact.title: Let's talk
